zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Harcourt於1152年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯時，他的父親Sir Ivo Yves d’Harcourt22歲，母親Agnes de Braose22歲。他於大約1174年與Isabel de Camville結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1202年7月3日享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Harcourt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the places in Eure and Calvados named Harcourt, from Old French cour(t) ‘court, farmyard’ (see Court ) with an obscure first element. This surname is very rare in France.

English: habitational name from either of two places in Shropshire named Harcourt. The one near Cleobury Mortimer gets the name from Old English heafocere ‘hawker, falconer’ + cot ‘hut, cottage’; the one near Wem has as its first element Old English hearpere (see Harper ).

History: The surname of French origin (see 1 above) is listed along with the equally rare or even extinct variants or altered forms Haraucourt, Herancourt, and Héraucourt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Court
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name from Middle English curt, court ‘large house’ (a word of the same ultimately Latin origin as 2 below), denoting someone who lived or worked in a manor house or castle, a courtly retainer.
French: topographic name from Old French co(u)rt ‘court, farmyard’ (from Latin cohors, cors, genitive cohortis, cortis ‘court, farmyard, enclosure’).

English and French: nickname for a physically small man, or ironically for a large man, from the adjective Middle English curt, Old French co(u)rt ‘short, small’ (from Latin curtus ‘curtailed, truncated, cut short, broken off’). Compare French Lecourt .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Harcourt was born in 1152, in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Ivo Yves d’Harcourt, was 22 and his mother, Agnes de Braose, was 22. He married Isabel de Camville about 1174. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 3 July 1202, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Harcourt est né en 1152, à Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ivo Yves d’Harcourt, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Braose, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Camville environ 1174. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 3 juillet 1202, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Harcourtが1152年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ボスウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Ivo Yves d’Harcourtは22歳，母Agnes de Braoseは22歳であった。約1174年にIsabel de Camvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1202年7月3日に50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Harcourt(이)가 1152년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ivo Yves d’Harcourt(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Braose(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1174년 Isabel de Camville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1202년 7월 3일 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Harcourt родился в 1152 г. в местности маркет босворт, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Ivo Yves d’Harcourt было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Braose, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Camville около 1174 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 3 июля 1202 г. в возрасте 50 лет.
